headline: A Look At A. O. Smith (AOS) Valuation After Analyst Downgrades And Softer Q1 Outlook
summary: Analyst downgrades put A. O. Smith under closer scrutiny Recent analyst downgrades following A. O. Smith (AOS) Q1 earnings miss and reduced guidance have put the stock in focus, as weaker residential demand in North America and soft sales in China weigh on sentiment. See our latest analysis for A. O. Smith. The analyst downgrades come after a weak recent period, with the share price down 21.23% over the past 90 days and the 1 year total shareholder return also in decline. This suggests...
